comment: 35yo female with macrocephaly (head circumference >97th %ile), characteristic mucocutaneous papillomas of the tongue and gingivae, family history of multiple thyroid nodules. Meets revised Cleveland Clinic / NCCN Cowden clinical criteria. No current cancer. Engine routes to PreventionPlan (after Agent F): standard = pre-test counseling + germline PTEN panel + breast cancer screening at 30 (mammography + breast MRI) + thyroid US q1y + endometrial surveillance discussion at 35-40 + colonoscopy from age 35; alternative = empirical surveillance.
